items.title: Treason Act 1814
items.description: An Act to alter the Punishment in certain Cases of High Treason.

items.title: Apprentices Act 1814 (repealed)
items.description: An Act to amend an Act passed in the Fifth Year of Queen Elizabeth, intituled “An Act containing divers Orders for “Artificers, Labourers, Servants of Husbandry, and “Apprentices.”
